title: Higher Category Theory & ∞-Categories

depth_additive.note: n-category enrichment: each step Δd = 2 → n-Cat is EML-2n for finite n
depth_additive.result: Categorical depth is additive under enrichment ✓

inf_groupoids.why: ∞-groupoid = homotopy type; π_n(X) for all n; oscillatory via Eilenberg-MacLane = EML-3

full_inf_groupoid.why: All homotopy groups together: oscillatory (Eilenberg-MacLane K(G,n)) = EML-3 shadow

identity_type.why: Id_A(a,b) = path a~b: ∞-groupoid = EML-∞; paths oscillatory = shadow=3

univalence_axiom.why: UA: (A≃B) = (A=B): equivalence = EML-∞; univalence uses exp(i·) geometry

higher_inductive_types.why: HITs: cells = oscillatory = EML-3; overall = EML-∞

suspension_spectrum.why: Σ^∞X: stable suspension = complex oscillation = EML-3

En.why: Height-n: EML-∞; shadow from E_∞ = EML-3

chromatic_ladder.note: Chromatic filtration = EML depth ladder under ×p
chromatic_ladder.result: Height 1 = EML-2; height 2 = EML-3; height n → EML-∞

presentable_infty.why: ∞-topos = hypercomplete ∞-category: EML-∞; shadow from oscillatory colimits = 3

adj_infinity.why: Adjoint pair in ∞-Cat: EML-∞; shadow from unit/counit oscillation = 3

new_finding.insight: ALL higher categorical structures: EML-∞ with shadow=3
new_finding.exception: n-Cat for finite n: EML-2n (finite depth, depth=2 per level)

semiring_verdicts.chromatic_filtration: Height-n = EML depth ladder: ht1=EML-2, ht2=EML-3, ht-n→EML-∞
semiring_verdicts.new_finding: Chromatic filtration in stable homotopy = EML depth ladder

key_theorem: Higher Category Semiring Theorem (S287): n-category depth is ADDITIVE: d(n-Cat) = 2n (each enrichment level adds Δd=2). ∞-categories/groupoids: EML-∞, shadow=3 (homotopy oscillation). HoTT: EML-∞, shadow=3 (identity types = paths = oscillatory). NEW FINDING: Chromatic filtration in stable homotopy = EML depth ladder: Height-1 (K-theory) = EML-2; Height-2 (tmf, modular forms) = EML-3; Height-n → EML-∞, shadow=3. The chromatic height is the EML depth ladder in another guise: this is a CATEGORICAL ANALOGUE of the EML hierarchy {0,2,3,∞}.
rabbit_hole_log: NEW: chromatic filtration = EML depth ladder (ht1=EML-2, ht2=EML-3, ht-n→EML-∞)
Chromatic height is the EML hierarchy in stable homotopy theory
